{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324005714892C3691815D6B9FB530\"}"},"total":474},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592276091345584920","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，人物刻画有特色，是我喜欢的类型，主角小事情贱贱的，大事情又不含糊，很有趣。故事剧情发展也有逻辑，目前看完了大部分，再囤一囤等完结。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767717275,"group_id":"7162138646554872847","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyqLvD4OiQoZxI1+r6CF/ww=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"659338885858160","user_name":"下三路的小山真伢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"659338885858160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1713580456,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7162138646554872847","book_info":{"abstract":"群雄逐鹿，百年混乱，大夏皇朝，一统九州，庙堂纷争风云起，江湖诡云变化多，我本平凡无奇少年郎，待到天下时局一遭变，且看我探手搅乾坤，横卧平天下","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6abbaf5e26d9cc0751ce1e8dcd955fd8","author":"南山跑马","author_id":"","book_id":"7162138646554872847","book_name":"少年春风踏九州","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"author
